title: Agent Fox Technical Core V1B-2E R3 — Targeted Real GUI Routing Cleanup
intent: Complete the verified V1B-2E cleanup using two exact replace_text edits and forward-slash relative paths, avoiding full-file payload and mixed-separator snapshot archive lookup defects.

validations.name: Verify exact two-file results, compilation, and normalized Workshop snapshot manifest
argv:
from pathlib import Path
import hashlib,json
post={"Z:\\FOXAI\\core\\director.py": [7003, "1397b0ce5d1e21b9fc49eabef76ffa64467d716061b12d1a2c670167597d7d55"], "Z:\\FOXAI\\ui\\main_window.py": [99139, "c232ce7f14a9fc7e898c13afcdfc7e56be1826b51d18d3c71979ac3f0b2acdc9"]}
for name,(size,digest) in post.items():
 data=Path(name).read_bytes()
 assert len(data)==size,(name,len(data),size)
 assert hashlib.sha256(data).hexdigest()==digest,name
 compile(data.decode("utf-8"),name,"exec")
snap=Path(r"Z:\FOXAI\System\EngineeringWorkshop\snapshots\ENG-20260722-225500-4D0517")
manifests=sorted(snap.glob("snapshot_*.manifest.json")); assert manifests
manifest=json.loads(manifests[-1].read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
entries=manifest["entries"]
normalized={row["relative_path"].replace("\\","/"):row for row in entries}
expected={'core/director.py': {'existed': True, 'sha256': '6b390b00d260113c958e1d6866c31fcde59a831c9af774a84994767191eef5fd', 'size': 7019}, 'ui/main_window.py': {'existed': True, 'sha256': 'a9c5bb86878e5f0cd27d221dbb32688b337e6026073a4b66d83339e0aef294a3', 'size': 99077}}
assert sorted(normalized)==sorted(expected),(sorted(normalized),sorted(expected))
assert len(entries)==2
for path,prior in expected.items():
 row=normalized[path]
 assert row["existed"] is prior["existed"],(path,row)
 assert row.get("size")==prior["size"],(path,row.get("size"),prior["size"])
 assert row.get("sha256")==prior["sha256"],(path,row.get("sha256"),prior["sha256"])
print("AGENT_FOX_V1B2E_R3_REPLACE_TEXT_AND_NORMALIZED_SNAPSHOT_OK")

validations.name: Verify ordinary evidence questions no longer collide with Engineer routing
argv:
from pathlib import Path
import importlib.util,sys
sys.path.insert(0,r"Z:\FOXAI")
p=Path(r"Z:\FOXAI\core\director.py")
spec=importlib.util.spec_from_file_location("foxai_v1b2e_r3_director",p)
mod=importlib.util.module_from_spec(spec); spec.loader.exec_module(mod)
assert "evidence" not in mod.ENGINEER_TRIGGERS
assert "ranked evidence" in mod.ENGINEER_TRIGGERS
for text in (
 "What evidence supports your answer about FOXAI resources?",
 "What are the limitations of this evidence?",
 "Can you provide evidence for that answer?",
 "What does the shared resource evidence provider do?",
):
 result=mod.classify(text,operator_approved=True,audit=False)
 assert result["agent"]=="chat",(text,result)
print("AGENT_FOX_V1B2E_R3_BARE_EVIDENCE_COLLISION_REMOVED")

validations.name: Verify explicit commands and strong engineering phrases still route to Engineer
argv:
from pathlib import Path
import importlib.util,sys
sys.path.insert(0,r"Z:\FOXAI")
p=Path(r"Z:\FOXAI\core\director.py")
spec=importlib.util.spec_from_file_location("foxai_v1b2e_r3_director_strong",p)
mod=importlib.util.module_from_spec(spec); spec.loader.exec_module(mod)
cases=(
 ("/engineer workshop status","engineer"),
 ("Please review your code for technical debt.","engineer"),
 ("Show ranked evidence for this architecture review.","engineer"),
 ("Investigate this Python error traceback.","engineer"),
)
for text,expected in cases:
 result=mod.classify(text,operator_approved=True,audit=False)
 assert result["agent"]==expected,(text,result)
assert mod.classify("What is the capital of France?",operator_approved=True,audit=False)["agent"]=="chat"
print("AGENT_FOX_V1B2E_R3_STRONG_ENGINEER_ROUTING_PRESERVED")

validations.name: Verify Desktop model-label rendering is idempotent and compiles
argv:
from pathlib import Path
p=Path(r"Z:\FOXAI\ui\main_window.py")
text=p.read_text(encoding="utf-8")
compile(text,str(p),"exec")
guard='if not answer.lstrip().startswith("[Model:"):'
prepend='answer = f"[Model: {model_used}]\n\n{answer}"'
assert text.count(guard)==1,text.count(guard)
assert text.count(prepend)==1,text.count(prepend)
def render(answer,model_used):
 answer=answer.strip()
 if not answer.lstrip().startswith("[Model:"):
  answer=f"[Model: {model_used}]\n\n{answer}"
 return answer
assert render("Hello","Model-A")=="[Model: Model-A]\n\nHello"
existing="[Model: Model-B]\n\nHello"
assert render(existing,"Model-A")==existing
print("AGENT_FOX_V1B2E_R3_MODEL_LABEL_IDEMPOTENT")

validations.name: Verify protected Agent Fox Technical Core components remain byte-identical
Verify WebUI source and Desktop self-knowledge-before-Director order remain unchanged
argv:
from pathlib import Path
import hashlib
web=Path(r"Z:\FOXAI\core\foxai_web.py").read_bytes()
assert hashlib.sha256(web).hexdigest()=="d7bf0a2042d55ef7f0a5869556015e42c7427e7ff88636b28e1795f3adf7b952"
compile(web.decode("utf-8"),r"Z:\FOXAI\core\foxai_web.py","exec")
main=Path(r"Z:\FOXAI\ui\main_window.py").read_text(encoding="utf-8")
assert main.index("route_desktop_message(text)") < main.index("self.format_director_analysis")
print("AGENT_FOX_V1B2E_R3_GUI_INTERCEPTION_ORDER_PRESERVED")

validations.name: Verify historical resource interception and current-live pass-through remain functional
argv:
from pathlib import Path
import importlib.util,json
root=Path(r"Z:\FOXAI\System\AgentFoxTechnicalCore")
def load(name,path):
 spec=importlib.util.spec_from_file_location(name,path); mod=importlib.util.module_from_spec(spec); spec.loader.exec_module(mod); return mod
desk=load("foxai_v1b2e_r3_desktop_helper",root/"desktop_self_knowledge_integration_v1.py")
web=load("foxai_v1b2e_r3_web_helper",root/"webui_self_knowledge_integration_v1.py")
historical="How much RAM did FOXAI use in the loaded capture?"
current="How much memory is my computer using right now?"
dh=desk.route_desktop_message(historical); dc=desk.route_desktop_message(current)
assert dh["intercepted"] is True and dh["model_bypass"] is True and dh["status"]=="answered",dh
assert dc["intercepted"] is False and dc["ordinary_chat_pass_through"] is True,dc
wh=web.route_http_request(json.dumps({"message":historical}).encode("utf-8"),"/api/chat/send")
wc=web.route_http_request(json.dumps({"message":current}).encode("utf-8"),"/api/chat/send")
assert wh["intercepted"] is True and wh["adapter_result"]["status"]=="answered",wh
assert wc["intercepted"] is False,wc
print("AGENT_FOX_V1B2E_R3_RESOURCE_ROUTING_PRESERVED")

validations.name: Verify mission binding, replace-text scope, and forward-slash target paths
argv:
from pathlib import Path
import json
p=Path(r"Z:\FOXAI\AGENT_FOX_V1B2E_R3\PLAN.json")
plan=json.loads(p.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
assert plan["schema"]=="foxai.engineering.plan.v1"
assert plan["mission_id"]=="ENG-20260722-225500-4D0517"
assert len(plan["changes"])==2
assert [row["path"] for row in plan["changes"]]==["core/director.py","ui/main_window.py"]
assert all(row["action"]=="replace_text" for row in plan["changes"])
assert all(row["expected_occurrences"]==1 for row in plan["changes"])
assert len(plan["validations"])==8
assert plan["expected_outputs"]==[]
assert plan["safety"]["modified_existing_files"]==2
assert plan["safety"]["technical_core_components_modified"]==0
assert plan["safety"]["webui_source_modified"] is False
assert plan["safety"]["model_calls"] is False
assert plan["safety"]["k_accessed"] is False
print("AGENT_FOX_V1B2E_R3_MISSION_SCOPE_AND_FORWARD_PATHS_OK")

rollback_boundary.notes: Only the two existing source files are in scope. The shared adapter, provider, helpers, contract, fixtures, and WebUI source are protected and unchanged.
